description.ko: 고요한 심해의 흐름이 빛나는 거품과 투명한 해파리들을 타원형 후광처럼 모은다.
description.en: A calm deep-sea current gathers glowing bubbles and translucent jellyfish into a quiet oval halo.

prompt: AQUA-5 deep ocean artwork focused on a close, vertical slice of blackwater where a gentle toroidal current folds bioluminescent life into an oval halo. Translucent jellyfish forms drift at different depths like glass bells and thin veils, their rims glowing #40E0D0 and #48D1CC against #000080 water. Chains of tiny bubbles cling to the curved flow lines, stretching into soft arcs as if pulled by slow fluid dynamics; medium-density luminous plankton particles shimmer between the layers. The background fades through #006994 blue-green gradients into quiet darkness, with no vessels, ruins, vents, or visible seabed. Calm, meditative atmosphere, crisp underwater macro detail, soft volumetric glow, peaceful transparent life moving at a measured medium pace.
